browser-content.description: Embedded browser-content child webview: unrestricted HTTPS/HTTP browsing, cookies, and DOM capture for the agent.

default.description: Default desktop capability for the SDKWork Browser main window renderer and platform host bridge.

window-controls.description: Custom Chrome/Edge-style title bar for the main window: minimize, maximize/restore, close, tab-bar drag region, and maximize-state listeners used by WindowControls.tsx and ShellLayout.tsx.
